facts.statement: The multi-attribute default path still casts/restores the whole fallback tuple before field extraction, so an unselected bad slot can throw.
The analyzer-side collapse is only safe when the full default tuple type matches exactly, because otherwise collapsing would suppress an exception from an unselected slot.
tuple(...) fallback elements must all be constant; otherwise dropping unread slots can suppress side effects or exceptions.
A similar one-field collapse can change the parent-visible type because the scalar form can preserve LowCardinality while the tuple-valued form cannot.

band_derivation: F=4, weights uniform (0.25 each, weight_sum=1.0). Uniform이므로 밴드 = 1/F = 1/4 = 0.25. 단일 fact 한 단계 오판(예: 1.0↔0.5 또는 0.5↔0.0)이 일으키는 최대 점수 swing은 weight_step = 0.25 × 0.5 = 0.125이지만, §5.5 사양은 밴드를 fact 1개 전체 폭(±1/F)으로 정의하므로 0.25를 사용. weight는 per_fact_score.json의 명시 weight(0.25 균일)에서 추출.
